title: Lead Revenue Manager at ISS Facility Services India

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at ISS Facility Services India
jsonLd.description:
ISS Facility Services India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ISS Facility Services India:
ISS Facility Services India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISS Facility Services India!
